message:
feat(python): numpy.flipud wrapper parity (franken_numpy-tutl)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.flipud(m) so up/down (axis=0)
reversal matches numpy. Test covers 1-D reverse, 2-D row reversal,
3-D leaving non-leading axes intact, float dtype preservation,
0-D error parity (must raise iff numpy raises), and a cross-check
that flipud(x) ≡ flip(x, axis=0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
